claims.claim_text: An LLM is trained on large amounts of text and used autoregressively to predict the next token in a sequence.
claims.span_hint: section: Start With The Simplest Honest Description
claims.rationale: This is the module's core technical definition and should point to a canonical foundational paper.

claims.claim_text: Models process tokens rather than raw words, and tokens can correspond to whole words, subword pieces, punctuation, and formatting-related markers.
claims.span_hint: section: Tokens, Context, and Prediction > Tokens
claims.rationale: The tokenization explanation is a factual mechanism claim that benefits from a compact foundational reference.

claims.claim_text: A context window is the amount of text an LLM can consider at once, and it is measured in tokens.
claims.span_hint: section: Tokens, Context, and Prediction > Tokens
claims.rationale: The module explicitly teaches context-window behavior as a token-budget concept, so that definition should be grounded.

claims.claim_text: At scale, large language models can perform useful language tasks such as generation, summarization, translation, and related text-processing tasks.
claims.span_hint: section: Start With The Simplest Honest Description
claims.rationale: The capability list is factual rather than purely rhetorical, so one broad foundational source is appropriate.

claims.claim_text: Search engines are retrieval systems that find and present relevant information in response to a query.
claims.span_hint: section: LLMs Are Not Search Engines
claims.rationale: The retrieval-vs-generation distinction is load-bearing in this section, and the retrieval side should be cited directly.

further_reading.title: Attention Is All You Need
further_reading.why_relevant: This is the foundational transformer paper behind most modern LLM architectures.

further_reading.title: Language Models are Few-Shot Learners
further_reading.why_relevant: This canonical paper helps learners connect next-token prediction to real downstream capabilities.

notes: Seed kept intentionally sparse: most remaining module text is pedagogical framing, mental-model coaching, quiz material, or exercise guidance rather than citation-worthy hard claims.
